title: Fundraising for NERV
wikitext:
[]: Fundraising for NERV             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Oct 15, 2009 4:43 pm Throughout the show there are numerous talks about budgeting between Gendo and SEELE. They are always complaining about not getting enough money from the government, so why don't they make their own money. If you could find a way for making more money, what would you do? Advertising, bake sales, restaraunts, or something else entirely? Since Evas became public knowledge, maybe they could have some kind of betting ring to wager which Eva would kill the targeted Angel and hand out cash prizes. The betting could be country or worldwide, so lots of money could be involved. The odds are 1 out of 3, and the odds are pretty good, so the money from lost bets could be sent directly to the budget. Sort of like horse racing or roulette.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 15, 2009 4:46 pm "If you don't want to die a horrible death then why not donate to NERV? We are the only thing protecting your asses from these monsters you know nothing about. So donate today!"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 15, 2009 4:55 pm Lemonade Stand.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 15, 2009 5:11 pm The pilots are all on subscription webcams. Why do you think they turned the cameras back on for the nude test, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 15, 2009 5:21 pm If doujin are anything to go by, Seele has a side job as a ramen stand. Nerv should take a page from their book.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 15, 2009 5:22 pm I'll just leave this here:

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Oct 15, 2009 5:23 pm sweet jesus, I nearly died laughing

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 15, 2009 6:06 pm I've seen that strip before, but it never gets old.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Oct 15, 2009 7:10 pm @ Sachi: Where did you find that?! It's awesomely funny!! @ Topic: There's been a lot of conspiracy theories about the UN/the Illuminati/the Rothschilds/:: Insert OH NOEZ TEHR'RE EVOL!111" group of choice:: controlling the world economy and being able to pull funds from any country's GNP to support their Evil Masterplan Du Jour and that's why :: Insert country of choice:: is having economic woes. I always figured the Eva-verse might be the one place where these conspiracy theories might have some weight to them. ./Fanon blithering warning: When I started writing Neon Enoch Evangelion , I snitched Storm Constantine's idea that Grigori angels had a hand on controlling international finances, etc. and ran with it, creating Enniel Prussot, who, on the surface, appears to be an eccentric but dangerous financier with the proverbial more "money than God". I had fun writing one bit where he refers to NERV HQ as "the money pit" because of the repair bills after the battle with Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Oct 15, 2009 7:31 pm Nerv's official revenue collection plan. 1. Punish the successful with additional income taxes. 2. Punish the poor with additional income taxes. 3. Allow civilians to take a ride on an Eva for a fee. 4. Become Vikings and pillage Europe. 5. Gendo pimps out some Rei clones. 6. Use an Eva to rob a bank. 7. Check the pockets of fallen Angels for any spare change. And if all else fails, request a bailout.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 15, 2009 8:30 pm The official nerv swimsuit calendar, and porno mag! Come one look at how Misato got to dress at work, she was reminding everyone how many magazines she sold baby! Ritsuko tried to get in on that action but well what can I say Misato is just more flexible. Also their is the take a swim in the Rei tank lottery . . Gendo wins every week though . . .

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 15, 2009 8:36 pm DatDude wrote: The official nerv swimsuit calendar, porno mag!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 15, 2009 8:52 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: DatDude wrote: The official nerv swimsuit calendar, porno mag!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 15, 2009 9:08 pm NemZ wrote: I've seen that strip before, but it never gets old.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 15, 2009 10:11 pm Lemonade stand....Hmm...I'm thinking of a little cosplay skit. This could happen.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Thu Oct 15, 2009 10:11 pm DatDude wrote: Also their is the take a swim in the Rei tank lottery . . Gendo wins every week though . . .

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Oct 16, 2009 3:50 am In all seriousness, they probably get money like any other nonprofit organization: sponsors and donations. Seele being their biggest sponsor; having connections in probably every large government in the world, they probably take some (or a lot, you decide) of the taxpayer's money of each country and use it to help fund Nerv, and various other projects (i.e., The Katsuragi Expedition). And of course, there's always the "We're saving your fucking lives, can't you give us a "little" discount?" Holy Diver wrote: 1. Punish the successful with additional income taxes. 2. Punish the poor with additional income taxes. 3. Allow civilians to take a ride on an Eva for a fee. 4. Become Vikings and pillage Europe. 5. Gendo pimps out some Rei clones. 6. Use an Eva to rob a bank. 7. Check the pockets of fallen Angels for any spare change.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Oct 16, 2009 5:05 am 1. Turn Gaghiel into fish sticks. 2. ??? 3. PROFIT!

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelion__x » Fri Oct 16, 2009 5:37 am Car wash.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Oct 16, 2009 5:48 am Evangelion__x wrote: Car wash.

[]: Fundraising for NERV             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Oct 15, 2009 4:43 pm Throughout the show there are numerous talks about budgeting between Gendo and SEELE. They are always complaining about not getting enough money from the government, so why don't they make their own money. If you could find a way for making more money, what would you do? Advertising, bake sales, restaraunts, or something else entirely? Since Evas became public knowledge, maybe they could have some kind of betting ring to wager which Eva would kill the targeted Angel and hand out cash prizes. The betting could be country or worldwide, so lots of money could be involved. The odds are 1 out of 3, and the odds are pretty good, so the money from lost bets could be sent directly to the budget. Sort of like horse racing or roulette.
